description: In this episode, Jacob Creech from Solana Foundation introduces staking and its applications, using a mobile game example to explain how tokens can be staked to earn rewards. He outlines the necessary accounts for building a staking program on Solana, emphasizing the importance of account management and security.
topic_summary: Introduction to staking on Solana, including account setup and the mechanics of earning rewards through token staking [t=31:86].
